pageContext.name: Mandalorian Life-Size Standee
pageContext.description: From Sideshow and Advanced Graphics, this life-size standee from the Lucasfilm/Disney+ Series Book of Boba Fett comes with an attached easel and folds down for simple shipping and storage! Based on the character the Mandalorian, or Din Djarin, and displayed in an iconic pose wielding both his blaster pistol and the legendary Darksaber, a weapon carrying vast importance to the Mandalorian people, this standee will be sure to strike up both fear and admiration! Stands 6 feet tall once display, and almost 3 feet wide, it will make a fine addition to your Star Wars collection.
